interaction_phrase: Researchers at the University of Warwick and University of Oxford
occurrence_sentence: Researchers at the University of Warwick and University of Oxford have developed a new way to simulate quantum systems of many particles, that allows for the investigation of the dynamic properties of quantum systems fully coupled to slowly moving ions.
